codestarnotifications.notificationrule.t: Information about the AWS Chatbot topics or AWS Chatbot clients associated with a notification rule.

codestarnotifications.notificationrule.t.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Chatbot topic or AWS Chatbot client.

The target type. Can be an Amazon Simple Notification Service topic or AWS Chatbot client.  + Amazon Simple Notification Service topics are specified as `SNS`.+ AWS Chatbot clients are specified as `AWSChatbotSlack`.
